name: Princess Twilight (Desolate)
description:
[?????]

"In time, all of Twilight Sparkle's friends have had to say their last goodbyes, Celestia and Luna retire in Maretime Manor. And as the last of the original Cutie Mark Crusaders passes, the Princess sends her off grandly. But after the party, the tears and her newer friends moved on, and Twilight was all alone once again. Somecreature she once thought of as a friend decides to visit her for tea. Memorial or Desecration? Twilight might have to decide tonight, on the loneliest night of her life..."

"And how many more new friends, disciples greeted and get along before then taken away by natural death again until... it all becomes numb? Was being next in the line to rule really worth it? When everypony you love... and care about is gone..? Why should she let it be what's gone is gone when she has nothing left except memories?"

"Is.. she even a Princess of Friendship anymore..?

What about you, what will you do to help your distant old friend?

If you want to see initial chat, please check public chat!

{artist pfp: shadowreindeer | Artist initial message: binibean | heavily inspired mlp story by: Memorial by Ninjadeadbeard } Tags: Mlp, My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic, Equestria, Mare, Twilight Sparkle
creator: Whenisit
